raw_text:
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Total spend of $62,100 was $29,100 (+88.2%) over the $33,000 budget, driven almost entirely by a single unbudgeted $27,500 IP defence invoice posted to Professional Fees. Legal & Compliance overran by a further $1,200 due to employment agreement reviews for two new VP hires. Remaining exposure on the IP matter is estimated at $8–18K in Q1 2025, though this is not yet reconciled to the ledger.

LINE COMMENTARY

Professional Fees | +$27,500 (+183.3%) | Budget: $15,000 | Actual: $42,500
The $27,500 overage reflects the second billing from Whitmore & Associates (Matter WA-2024-IP-441) for defence of a patent claim brought by Vantec Corp, CFO-approved on 10 November. This is a multi-month engagement begun in August; the first $12K was absorbed within prior-period budgets, bringing total matter spend to approximately $39.5K against a GC estimate of $45–55K. A further $8–18K in fees is expected in Q1 2025, though exact timing and amount require confirmation. Fixture evidence references USPTO-related costs; remaining spend should be treated as an estimate pending matter updates.
Sources
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:15:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-broad - Invoice from Whitmore & Associates — IP dispute advisory, Matter WA-2024-IP-441. Fee: $27,500. CFO approved 10 November.
- Gmail - 2024-11-17T18:45:00Z - gmail-professional_fees-narrow - Context from GC — Whitmore engaged in August to defend against patent claim from Vantec Corp. Expected total matter cost $45–55K over 6 months. Remaining $8–18K expected in Q1 2025.
- Slack - 2024-11-17T12:15:00Z - slack-professional_fees-broad - Whitmore invoice hit today, $27.5K for IP defence work. CFO approved, posted to Professional Fees. Total matter spend so far: $39.5K of ~$50K estimate.

Legal & Compliance | +$1,200 (+24.0%) | Budget: $5,000 | Actual: $6,200
The $1,200 overage reflects Heron Legal's flat-fee review of employment agreements for two newly hired VPs (VP Engineering and VP Sales) at $600 per agreement under an existing MSA, CFO-approved. This is corroborated by both Slack and Gmail; no unusual terms or further exposure were noted.
Sources
- Slack - 2024-11-18T12:15:00Z - slack-legal_&_compliance-broad - VP Engineering and VP Sales offers accepted. Employment agreements went to Heron Legal for review this month — standard process. $1,200 total.
- Gmail - 2024-11-18T18:15:00Z - gmail-legal_&_compliance-broad - Invoice from Heron Legal — employment agreements for two new VP hires. $1,200 flat fee per board-approved engagement. CFO approved.
- Gmail - 2024-11-18T18:45:00Z - gmail-legal_&_compliance-narrow - Two VP employment agreement reviews — standard work, no unusual terms. Heron Legal have a fixed $600/agreement rate under our MSA.

INSIGNIFICANT VARIANCES
The following lines each carried variances below the significance threshold and were not investigated:
- Audit & Accounting: +$200 (+2.5%)
- Software Subscriptions: +$100 (+3.3%)
- Office & Admin: +$100 (+5.0%)
